title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team completed a full triage of the abuse queue today. Here is a summary of outcomes:

**Actions Taken**
- Two accounts were permanently banned for high-severity violations: one for coordinated phishing spam (links posted across multiple channels in rapid succession) and one for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.
- One account received a formal warning for suspicious automation behavior (near-identical repeated replies in help channels). This account is now under active monitoring.

**Reports Closed Without Sanction**
- A low-severity formatting report was closed with no action — the member will receive informal guidance.
- Two reports involving trusted community volunteers were reviewed and closed. Per policy, reports against trusted roles require human escalation review rather than automated sanction. One was identified as a false positive resulting from a coordinated brigading attempt following a moderation decision; the other is being escalated to senior staff for review.

**Policy Reminder**
Our community standards prohibit phishing, harassment, and coordinated abuse. Violations are handled according to our published sanctions matrix. Trusted volunteers are subject to a separate escalation process to ensure fairness and due process.

All 6 open reports have been resolved or escalated. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports — your vigilance keeps this community safe.
